code: import React from'react';import{motion}from'framer-motion';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AnimatedStars=()=>{const stars=Array.from({length:50},(_,i)=>({id:i,x:Math.random()*100,y:Math.random()*100,size:Math.random()*3+1,duration:Math.random()*3+2,delay:Math.random()*2}));return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"fixed inset-0 overflow-hidden pointer-events-none",children:stars.map(star=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(motion.div,{className:"absolute rounded-full bg-light-blue opacity-60",style:{left:`${star.x}%`,top:`${star.y}%`,width:`${star.size}px`,height:`${star.size}px`},animate:{y:[0,-20,0],opacity:[0.3,0.8,0.3]},transition:{duration:star.duration,repeat:Infinity,delay:star.delay,ease:"easeInOut"}},star.id))});};export default AnimatedStars;
